route_reasons: AccessKey related event → credential misuse risk.
No strong indicators for containment or critical response → observe.

debug_info.query_text_used: event summary: Stealth:S3/ServerAccessLoggingDisabled Amazon S3 Server Access Logging was disabled for the S3 bucket GeneratedFindingS3Bucket. Amazon S3 Server Access Logging was disabled for the S3 bucket GeneratedFindingS3Bucket by GeneratedFindingUserName calling PutBucketLogging. This can lead to lack of visibility into actions taken on the affected S3 bucket and its objects if an event occurs. AccessKey GeneratedFindingAPIName severity 2 | runtime signals: aws_api_call, api_generatedfindingapiname, stealth, serveraccessloggingdisabled | runtime tags: credential, identity, iam, accesskey | security meaning: log collection interruption, audit logging disabled, security event visibility gap, monitoring coverage degradation | regulatory language: data protection, sensitive data, data retention, data deletion, data disclosure, secure disposal | expected categories: LOG, Logging, SEF, IncidentResponse | downweight categories: CEK, IAM
